title: qDrift
description: Stochastic Hamiltonian simulation using random sampling of Hamiltonian terms. Provides provable error bounds with simple implementation.

params.help: Hamiltonian to be simulated. It must be a non-empty Hermitian square matrix provided as a 2D array; non-power-of-2 dimensions are padded internally.
params.name: H
params.info: 请输入非空厄米方阵二维数组；非2的幂维度会在算法内部补零（如 [[2, 1], [1, 3]]）

params.help: Total evolution time for the Hamiltonian simulation.
params.name: t

params.help: Number of steps in the simulation.
params.name: steps
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在1到100000之间（如 5000）
